node.text: Joanna is lactose intolerant and is trying out dairy-free options like coconut or almond milk in her dessert recipes.

node.text: Joanna is experimenting with making dessert recipes yummier and more accessible.

node.text: Joanna tried her newest dairy-free recipe and it was a winner with her family.
Joanna makes desserts that work for everyone's diets, including dairy-free chocolate coconut cupcakes with raspberry frosting.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "desert almond milk") on Session 20 (Score: 0.71)
